description:
Parent epic: V3 E10: Streaming and AgentView

Source task 3/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Decide whether `AgentView` should be renamed or repositioned for beginner
  clarity.

Epic closure criteria:
- streaming and AgentView support a clean UI story
- projected state matches the canonical runtime state

comments.text: Decision: keep AgentView as the concrete V3 module name, but teach the beginner concept as UI projection. Updated README, FEATURES, moduledoc, and decision log. Full gate passed.

title: E10: Decide whether AgentView should be renamed or repositioned for beginner clarity
